audit_items.proof_trace: Within free_cb, close_and_free_remote accesses all fields of ctx (ev_timer_stop, ev_io_stop, close, ss_free) sequentially before freeing — ctx is never dereferenced after ss_free(ctx). Double-free is prevented because direct close_and_free_remote calls outside free_cb only occur on freshly allocated remote_ctx objects not yet inserted into the cache (!cache_hit guard at L1254 and L631). The defensive server_ctx==NULL path in remote_recv_cb (L660-663) that would otherwise bypass the cache is unreachable: remote_ctx->server_ctx is set once in new_remote (L485) and never nullified anywhere in the codebase.
